The '''heavy recovery vehicle''' was a tracked vehicle used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
The vehicle was used to recover disabled or damaged tanks on the battlefield. It was armed with at least one laser cannon for protection.

==History==
At least one recovery vehicle of this type was attached to the [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|112th Repulsorlift Armor Regiment]], ''"Hell's Hammers"''. Here, it worked in conjunction with repulsorlift barges to reclaim disabled assets and move them to relatively secure locations.

==Behind the scenes==
The drawing used to depict this vehicle, was a discarded concept art for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']].
